title: Chiba,  — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

content:
Overview

Chiba is a city in with a population of 982,000. A coastal city east of Tokyo with a major port, Narita Airport access, and the magical Disney Resort.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
